title: Compact categorical interactions
summary: Add a small set of domain-relevant categorical crosses instead of broad interaction explosions.
rationale: The run repeatedly used `Race_Year`, race-compound, driver-compound, and driver-race style context. Broad interaction bloat was less clearly useful, so a curated set is preferable.
implementation_hint: Create string interactions such as `Race_Year`, `Race_Compound`, `Driver_Compound`, `Driver_Race`, and `Compound_Stint` when source columns exist. Add frequencies for these interactions but avoid high-order crosses beyond three fields.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: High-cardinality crosses can overfit random holdouts; keep the interaction set compact and preserve raw categories.
